messages.content: You are a financial research assistant. When you need the current date, use the get_current_date tool. When you need stock price information, use the web_search tool. Use tools step by step to gather information before producing a final response.
Compare Google's current stock price to last month's price. Show the difference in dollars and percentage.

function.name: get_current_date
function.description: Returns today's date in YYYY-MM-DD format

function.name: web_search
function.description: Searches the web and returns an array of result strings
